title: Tephroseris serpentini
taxonomy: Tephroseris serpentini is classified as a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to the mountains of Europe, specifically in the central and southern parts of the continent. The classification of Tephroseris serpentini is further detailed under the genus Tephroseris, which is part of the family Asteraceae. Tephroseris serpentini is a perennial plant and its classification is closely related to its botanical characteristics and morphology. The classification of Tephroseris serpentini is essential for understanding its behavior, distribution, and evolutionary history.
